items.caption: A woman in a black leather jacket and black boots stands in front of a modern, automated book dispensing kiosk, which is part of the Milwaukee Public Library's MPL Express. The kiosk is situated in a covered area with a grassy field in the background. The kiosk features a large screen displaying a colorful array of book covers and icons, with the library's logo prominently displayed. The kiosk is open to the public and is located in Westlawn Gardens, Silver Spring.
